name: ai-productivity-career-platform
description: MERN stack — AI Productivity & Career Management Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
